title: To tilt Hungarian election, Russians proposed staging assassination attempt
summary_full: To aid Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, a friend of Russia, in his election, operatives proposed “the Gamechanger” — a staged assassination attempt to stir supporters.
summary_public: To aid Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, a friend of Russia, in his election, operatives proposed “the Gamechanger” — a staged assassination attempt to stir supporters.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: To tilt Hungarian election, Russians proposed staging assassination attempt
